note: These risks were identified by Stage 4 static analysis but NOT reproduced by Stage 5 symbolic execution. They require downstream dynamic testing for further validation.

risks.message: Firmware state machine 'ddr5_init' is missing 12 protocol-defined state(s): ['DDR5_STATE_CA_TRAIN', 'DDR5_STATE_CKE_HIGH', 'DDR5_STATE_CRC_CONFIG', 'DDR5_STATE_DCA_TRAIN', 'DDR5_STATE_DQ_TRAIN', 'DDR5_STATE_ERROR', 'DDR5_STATE_MR_CONFIG', 'DDR5_STATE_MR_VERIFY', 'DDR5_STATE_READY', 'DDR5_STATE_RESET', 'DDR5_STATE_VREF_TRAIN', 'DDR5_STATE_ZQ_CALIB']

Missing 10 expected state transition(s): DDR5_STATE_RESET→DDR5_STATE_CKE_HIGH, DDR5_STATE_CKE_HIGH→DDR5_STATE_MR_CONFIG, DDR5_STATE_MR_CONFIG→DDR5_STATE_VREF_TRAIN, DDR5_STATE_VREF_TRAIN→DDR5_STATE_ZQ_CALIB, DDR5_STATE_ZQ_CALIB→DDR5_STATE_DQ_TRAIN, DDR5_STATE_DQ_TRAIN→DDR5_STATE_CA_TRAIN, DDR5_STATE_CA_TRAIN→DDR5_STATE_DCA_TRAIN, DDR5_STATE_DCA_TRAIN→DDR5_STATE_CRC_CONFIG, DDR5_STATE_CRC_CONFIG→DDR5_STATE_MR_VERIFY, DDR5_STATE_MR_VERIFY→DDR5_STATE_READY
Function 'ddr5_train_vref_dq' writes MR6 Vref DQ value. Spec limits VREF_DQ_VAL to 127 (7-bit), but training function may return 0-255. Values >127 will be silently truncated.
Function 'ddr5_train_vref_ca' writes MR6 Vref DQ value. Spec limits VREF_DQ_VAL to 127 (7-bit), but training function may return 0-255. Values >127 will be silently truncated.
Function '_state_vref_train' writes MR6 Vref DQ value. Spec limits VREF_DQ_VAL to 127 (7-bit), but training function may return 0-255. Values >127 will be silently truncated.
DDR5 ERROR state has no outgoing transitions — it is a dead-end state with no recovery path.
Register dependency detected: MR5_DFE_EN depends on MR3 CRC configuration state. Verify configuration order in '_state_mr_config'.
